MORPH: Reduce cost by the cost of matching Human to play.
PILOT: Play this on top of a Ranger and combine stats.
GUARD: Must be chosen as an attack or black target first if able.
CHARGE: Can attack the turn it is played.
LAST_BREATH: When destroyed, may summon Giant form.
OVERWHELM: Excess damage hits the enemy Location.
HUNT: Can choose active units as attack targets.
